name: Sorrel & Haricot Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the haricot beans overnight.
2. Boil the soaked beans in water with the oil, bay leaf, and sliced onion until tender.
3. Drain the beans and discard the bay leaf.
4. Briefly blend the cooked beans to a smooth consistency.
5. Gradually mix in the stock while stirring continuously.
6. Finely chop the sorrel leaves.
7. Melt the margarine in a pot over medium heat.
8. Stir in the chopped sorrel leaves until they soften.
9. Pass the mixture through a sieve into the beans to combine.
10. Heat the soup to just below boiling point.
11. Stir in the soymilk and season with salt and pepper to taste.
12. Serve hot, garnished with freshly chopped parsley.
